allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./data/checklist_items.json'\); const med = d.filter\(i => i.priority === 'critical' && ['sleep','morning_light','nutrition'].includes\(i.category\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(med.map\(i => \({id: i.id, title: i.title, category: i.category}\)\), null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./data/protocols.json'\); const adv = d.filter\(p => p.advanced === true\); console.log\('advanced protocols:', adv.length\); const basic = d.filter\(p => !p.advanced\); console.log\('basic protocols:', basic.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./data/foods.json'\); const s = require\('./data/supplements.json'\); const p = require\('./data/protocols.json'\); const b = require\('./data/blood_markers.json'\); const c = require\('./data/checklist_items.json'\); const cg = require\('./data/cooking_guides.json'\); const sh = require\('./data/shopping_items.json'\); const cl = require\('./data/claims.json'\); console.log\('total:', d.length+s.length+p.length+b.length+c.length+cg.length+sh.length+cl.length\)")
Bash(node -e "const t = require\('./tsconfig.json'\); console.log\('resolveJsonModule:', t.compilerOptions.resolveJsonModule, 'moduleResolution:', t.compilerOptions.moduleResolution\)")
